headlines.headline: Prabowo's Export Overhaul Triggers JCI Slide
headlines.summary: Government plan to centralize commodity exports through a state-designated company creates pricing uncertainty for private exporters.

headlines.headline: Heavy Foreign Outflows Pressure Indonesian Equities
headlines.summary: JCI dropped 8.35% in a week as foreign investors pull capital, seeking support at the 6,100 level.

headlines.headline: USD/IDR Stability Tied to US-Iran De-escalation
headlines.summary: Rupiah remains range-bound around 17,700 as markets await geopolitical clarity in the Middle East.

ADRO.headline: Strong Q1 Performance and Strategic Pivot
ADRO.summary: Earnings per share beat estimates by 16% with a focus on spinning off thermal coal arm (AADI) to diversify into renewables.

PTBA.headline: Q1 Profit Jumps 105%
PTBA.summary: Net profit doubled to IDR 801.79 billion driven by cost discipline and favorable state-miner export regulations.

ASII.headline: Automotive Market Share Compression
ASII.summary: Car market share slipped to 49% in Q1 2026 due to intensifying competition and a soft mass-market segment.

SIDO.headline: Q1 Net Profit Drops 36.8%
SIDO.summary: Profitability hit by more selective consumer spending patterns in the health and wellness segment.

AADI.headline: Spin-off from ADRO Focuses on Thermal Coal
AADI.summary: Separation aims to streamline the parent company's transition to green energy while maintaining cash flows from coal.

UNTR.headline: No Immediate Plans for Stock Split
UNTR.summary: Management maintains current share structure despite volatility in the mining machinery segment.

headlines.headline: JCI Continues Slide as Foreign Outflows Persist
headlines.summary: Indonesian equities remain under pressure continuing last week's 8.35% decline; investors monitor 6,100 support level for signs of stabilization.

headlines.headline: Commodity Export Policy Uncertainty Weighs on Mining Sector
headlines.summary: Prabowo's centralized export plan continues to create headwinds for coal and resource exporters; policy clarity expected in coming weeks.

headlines.headline: Gold Holds Near Record Levels Above $4,500
headlines.summary: Safe-haven demand persists on geopolitical uncertainty; gold remains elevated above $4,500/oz as Middle East tensions and trade policy shifts drive portfolio hedging.

headlines.headline: Rupiah Consolidates Around 17,700 Level
headlines.summary: USD/IDR remains range-bound near recent averages; Bank Indonesia's reserves and US-Iran developments remain key watchpoints for FX direction.

ADRO.headline: Monitoring Renewables Spin-off Progress
ADRO.summary: ADRO's diversified Q1 performance underpins the strategic pivot; investors watching AADI separation timeline and renewable project pipeline.

PTBA.headline: Strong Q1; Policy Headwinds Remain
PTBA.summary: Despite doubled Q1 profit, centralized export policy could affect future revenue streams for the state-affiliated miner.

ASII.headline: EV Competition Intensifies in ASEAN
ASII.summary: Chinese EV manufacturers gaining share in ASEAN; ASII's 49% car market share faces structural pressure from lower-cost electric competitors.

SIDO.headline: Consumer Spending Tightness Continues
SIDO.summary: Selective consumer behavior in health and wellness segment continues to pressure margins; Q2 outlook cautious.

AADI.headline: Thermal Coal Arm Seeks Independent Footing
AADI.summary: Post-spin-off AADI working to establish standalone operations; coal prices and ADRO parent relationship remain key variables.

UNTR.headline: Mining Machinery Demand Stable
UNTR.summary: No structural changes at UNTR; equipment orders holding steady amid broader mining sector uncertainty.

days.price_note: Prices carried forward from 2026-05-25 close; live market data unavailable due to scraping infrastructure issue.
